dashboard.subtitleAdmin: Here's a snapshot of your current operations.
dashboard.subtitleSupplier: You can view and update production status for items assigned to you.
dashboard.subtitleViewer: You have read-only access to dashboards and reports.
dashboard.overdueSubtitle: Past delivery date and not yet Completed.
dashboard.getStartedSubtitle: CargoFlow is ready. Upload your first PO and the dashboard will start populating.
dashboard.uploadAPODesc: Excel parser handles legacy + template formats.
dashboard.addSuppliersDesc: Set up supplier records before uploading POs.
dashboard.upcomingDeliveriesDesc: Items due soon, not yet completed.

po.title: Purchase orders
po.subtitle: {count} POs in the system.
po.noPOsBodyMerchant: Upload your first PO Excel file to get started. CargoFlow will parse it and let you preview before saving.
po.noPOsBodySupplier: POs will appear here once a merchant uploads them.
po.editFabricDesc: Fill in any missing values below. Once saved, each field is locked and can't be edited again. Already-locked fields are shown for reference but can't be changed.
po.editFabricSaved: Fabric details saved. Locked from further edits.

production.title: Production
production.subtitleAdmin: Live view of production progress across all suppliers.
production.subtitleSupplier: Items assigned to you. Update production status and CBM as you go.
production.noCBMWarning: {count} {count, plural, one {item is} other {items are}} in production but still have no CBM declared.
production.alsoMarkCompleted: Also mark this item as Completed
production.packageCountMustBeWholeNonNegative: Package count must be a whole number ≥ 0.
production.grossMustBeNumber: Gross weight must be a number.
production.netMustBeNumber: Net weight must be a number.
production.netCannotExceedGross: Net weight cannot exceed gross weight.

containers.title: Containers
containers.subtitle: {count} containers · {open} open · {sealed} sealed · {shipped} shipped · avg utilization {pct}%
containers.noContainersBodyEmpty: Create your first container, or use Auto-allocate to let CargoFlow create them for you based on Completed items.
containers.detailFromSuppliers: {itemCount} {itemCount, plural, one {item} other {items}} from {supplierCount} {supplierCount, plural, one {supplier} other {suppliers}}
containers.detailSealedReady: This container is sealed and ready. Attach it to a vessel from the Vessels page.
containers.createDescription: Register a physical container so items can be loaded into it.
containers.createNumberHint: The physical container ID from the carrier.
containers.createTypeHint: Usable CBM is automatically calculated using the global usable-% setting (default 92%).
containers.allocateAssignDesc: Pick Completed items with CBM declared. Items move to Loaded status when assigned.
containers.allocateNoItems: No Completed items with CBM declared. Mark items as Completed and add CBM on the Production page first.
containers.allocateOverflowWarning: Selection exceeds capacity by {cbm} CBM. Deselect items.
containers.autoDesc: Pack Completed items into containers automatically. Earliest delivery dates are prioritized.
containers.autoTypeHint: Existing Open containers will be filled first. New containers are created with this type when needed.
containers.autoHowText1: Picks every Completed item with CBM declared and no container yet.
containers.autoHowText2: Sorts by delivery date (earliest first), then by CBM (larger first within a date).
containers.autoHowText3: Fills tightest-fitting Open container first; creates a new one when nothing fits.
containers.autoHowText4: Skips items larger than a single container's capacity (you'll be notified).
containers.autoHowText5: Nothing is committed until you click "Apply".
containers.autoSkippedMore: + more (apply will skip these; they stay Completed)
containers.carrierDescription: The carrier-issued container ID (e.g. MSCU1234567). This becomes the display name everywhere. The internal system ID stays the same. Once the container is sealed, this can no longer be changed.
containers.carrierHint: Must be unique. Letters and numbers only is typical.
containers.carrierMissing: No carrier container number yet — set it before sealing.
containers.createCarrierPlaceholder: e.g. MSCU1234567 (leave blank if not yet known)
containers.createOptionalHint: The physical container ID from the carrier. If you don't have it yet, CargoFlow assigns a temporary system ID (CTR-YYYY-MM-NNN) that you can replace before sealing.

vessels.title: Vessels
vessels.subtitle: {count} vessels tracked.
vessels.noVesselsBody: Create a vessel to start attaching sealed containers and tracking shipments.
vessels.createDesc: Register a vessel to attach containers to.
vessels.warnNotAllSealed: Vessel can be dispatched only when all attached containers are sealed.
vessels.attachDesc: Only unassigned Open or Sealed containers are shown. Sealed containers are ready to ship.
vessels.attachNoContainers: No unassigned containers found. Create or load containers first.
vessels.dispatchConfirm: Dispatch vessel {id}? All containers will be marked Shipped and all items will move to Shipped status. This cannot be undone.

packingLists.title: Packing lists
packingLists.subtitle: {count} {count, plural, one {packing list} other {packing lists}} generated. Download as PDF anytime.
packingLists.searchPlaceholder: Search PL number, vessel, container, supplier, destination...
packingLists.noListsBody: Open a vessel that has sealed containers and click "Generate packing lists" to create them.
packingLists.deletePLConfirm: Delete packing list {label}? You can re-generate it from the vessel page.
packingLists.generateDesc: One packing list is created for each (container, supplier) combination on vessel {vessel}.
packingLists.generateNothingToDo: This vessel has no containers with items, so there's nothing to generate.
packingLists.generateReplaceCheckbox: Replace existing packing lists with fresh data ({count})
packingLists.generateSummary: {created, plural, =0 {} one {# created} other {# created}}{created, plural, =0 {} other {, }}{replaced, plural, =0 {} other {# replaced, }}{skipped, plural, =0 {} other {# skipped}}
